spec_match.rationale: Dispatches synthetic pointermove with coalescedEvents whose sub-events target A and B, asserts targets remain distinct.

interactive.rationale: Fire button dispatches the event, two visible targets, log readout.

edge_cases.rationale: Single direction of contrast (Chrome 130 preserves targets). No pre-130 simulation. Doesn't cover predicted events.

openQuestions.title: Add a trusted vs untrusted contrast
openQuestions.detail: The spec change is specifically about UNTRUSTED PointerEvents getting different behaviour. A side-by-side with trusted events would clarify the scope of the change.

openQuestions.title: Show what pre-130 would have logged
openQuestions.detail: Add a 'simulate pre-130' button that retargets sub-events to the parent. Without that the demo only shows the new behaviour.
